caption:
Disco partners since 2007! 💃🏻🕺

Happy Anniversary to us @edzphotography! How lucky I am to have you dancing with me through life… sometimes we know the steps, most of the time we just follow the beat, but we always find ways to enjoy the music. 

😘😘😘

Video taken in #Hatta

 #VisitHatta #Dubai #DubaiDestinations #ladyandhersweetescapes • Where to go in Dubai • Places in Dubai

transcription.text: There's nothing like it, not like the way you move I can try but I can't hide it from you
